src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace deprecated `DeviceTwin` and `RegistryManager` classes with the newer `TwinClient` and `RegistryClient` from the updated Azure IoT SDK.
Adapt device creation to use the new `Device` constructor and `RegistryClient.addDevice` method instead of the static factory and old manager.
Migrate device twin querying from the old `SqlQuery` and `DeviceTwin` iteration pattern to the new `TwinClient.query` and `TwinQueryResponse` pattern.
Update the logic for setting device tags to use the new `Twin` object and `TwinClient.patch` method.
Remove dependency on Google Guava by replacing `Lists.newArrayList()` with standard `java.util.ArrayList`.
Remove dependency on Google Gson as it is no longer required for the new SDK exception handling.
Update logger initialization to use `MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass()` for better performance and correctness in modern Java.
Replace generic `Exception` catches and silent logging with specific SDK exceptions and a custom `IotDeviceProviderException` for better error propagation.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: catch (Exception e) { LOG.error(...) } -> catch (IotHubException | IOException e) { throw new IotDeviceProviderException(...) }

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add a new `deviceExists` method to explicitly check for device presence without throwing exceptions for missing devices.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: public boolean deviceExists(String deviceId) { ... return true/false; }

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add a new `logRegistryClientStatistics` method to retrieve and log device counts using the new `RegistryClient.getStatistics` API.
Change constructor to inject specific clients and configuration strings directly instead of relying on Spring `@Component` and `@Autowired` with a properties object.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: @Autowired public IoTDeviceProvider(DeviceTwin, RegistryManager, AzureProperties) -> public IoTDeviceProvider(TwinClient, RegistryClient, String, String)

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace manual HTTP REST calls with a dedicated LiveObjects SDK adapter for command sending.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Removed RestTemplate and replaced with LoAdapter.sendCommand()

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Introduce Failsafe library to handle transient failures with retry policies and fallbacks.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Wrapped command execution in Failsafe.with(objectFallback, commandRetryPolicy).run()

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Change the send method to return an IotHubMessageResult instead of void to indicate success or rejection.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Changed return type from void to IotHubMessageResult and added return statements

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Parse the incoming command string into a structured CommandAddRequest object using Jackson.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added ObjectMapper dependency and objectMapper.readValue(command, CommandAddRequest.class)

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add SLF4J logging to capture errors when command sending fails.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added Logger field and LOG.error() call in catch block

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Remove Spring-specific annotations and dependencies from the class definition.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM from 2.1.8.RELEASE to 3.2.3, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Add the new FIFO_SDK_LiveObjects dependency required for the updated LiveObjects integration.
Add the JitPack repository to resolve the new GitHub-hosted FIFO SDK dependency.
Upgrade the Azure IoT Service Client from 1.18.0 to 2.1.7 to support newer Azure IoT Hub features and Java 21 compatibility.
Upgrade the Azure IoT Device Client from 1.18.0 to 2.4.1 to align with the service client and ensure compatibility.
Update the Application Insights Spring Boot Starter to version 2.6.4 for better monitoring support.
Update the Azure Spring Boot Metrics Starter to version 2.3.5 for improved metrics collection.
Add Spring Integration JMX support for enhanced monitoring capabilities.
Add the Maven Model dependency, likely for runtime POM parsing or configuration handling.
Add Apache Commons Text for string manipulation utilities.
Add the Jodah Failsafe library for retry and circuit breaker patterns.
Add ArchUnit for architecture testing to enforce code structure rules.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 integration for modern test framework support.
Remove the Spring Integration MQTT dependency, likely replaced by the new FIFO SDK or Azure IoT clients.
Remove the Guava dependency, possibly due to replacement by standard Java 21 features or other libraries.
Remove the Azure Event Hubs dependency, likely no longer needed for the current architecture.
Add the Maven Release Plugin to automate versioning and release processes.
Remove the Azure WebApp Maven Plugin, likely shifting deployment strategy away from direct Azure App Service deployment via Maven.
Add SCM configuration to support Maven release plugin operations.
Add a release profile with assembly and appassembler plugins for creating distributable packages.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added application-dev.yml to gitignore to prevent committing local development configuration.
Added /temp/ directory to gitignore to exclude temporary files from version control.

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright holder in the license file from 'Live Objects' to 'Orange'.

README.md.general_idea: Reorganized the README structure to include a table of contents and separate sections for general info, technologies, and requirements.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Table of contents' and split content into 'General info', 'Technologies', 'Requirements', etc.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the project description to explicitly list the three main synchronization features: devices, messages, and commands.
README.md.human_impl: Added bullet points for devices synchronization, messages synchronization, and commands synchronization.

README.md.general_idea: Added a dedicated 'Technologies' section listing specific versions of Java, Spring Boot, and Azure SDKs used in the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Technologies' with Java 8, Spring Boot 2.4.4, Microsoft Azure SDK IoT 1.22.0, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Expanded the requirements section to include specific Azure resources like Application Insights and App Service plans.
README.md.human_impl: Added requirements for Application Insights resource and App Service plan creation.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the old Maven plugin-based deployment instructions with instructions for downloading a release package or building a ZIP archive.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Application deployment' with 'Getting the installation package' and 'Building' sections.

README.md.general_idea: Completely rewrote the configuration section to reflect the new multi-tenant YAML structure and added detailed explanations for each property.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced simple property list with a full `application.yaml` example and detailed subsections for each config key.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced Azure WebApp deployment instructions with instructions for deploying on an Azure Linux Virtual Machine.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Deploy on Azure Linux virtual machine' section with CLI commands for VM creation and script execution.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Refactor configuration from flat single-tenant structure to a multi-tenant list supporting multiple Azure IoT Hub connections.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Replaced flat 'lo' and 'azure' keys with 'tenant-list' containing 'live-objects-properties' and 'azure-iot-hub-list'.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Enable Spring Boot Actuator endpoints for health checks and metrics export to Azure Monitor.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Added 'management' section with endpoint exposure, health details, and azuremonitor metrics export configuration.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Simplify Application Insights configuration by removing legacy channel settings and enabling it explicitly.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Removed 'channel' nested properties under 'application-insights' and added 'enabled: true'.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Introduce configuration properties for device synchronization intervals and persistence.
Add configuration for IoT Hub message retry logic and session reestablishment delays.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add MIT license header comment to the logback configuration file.
Enable automatic reloading of the logback configuration file every 15 minutes.
Update the console appender log pattern to include full date and remove duplicate pattern definition.
Add a rolling file appender for INFO level logs with 7-day retention.
Add a rolling file appender for all log levels with 7-day retention.
Add specific logger configuration for Eclipse Paho MQTT client at FINE level.
Add specific logger configuration for Apache Qpid at FINE level.
Add specific logger configuration for Proton trace at FINE level.
Attach the new file appenders to the root logger to enable file logging.
